summary: This is a redirect post announcing Steve Yegge's move from Blogger to Medium. The actual content about why he left Google to join Grab is hosted on Medium. This post serves only as a pointer for readers who followed his Blogger site.
key_points: Yegge migrated his blogging platform from Blogger to Medium
The substantive content about his Google departure exists only on Medium
This marks the end of his Blogger era
money_quotes: I've officially switched from Blogger to Medium.
key_insight: This is a placeholder redirect post with no substantive content - the real article lives on Medium.
